P1 Can't Charge Up Special Meter
P1 Only Needs to Win 1 Round
P1 Cannot Do Special Moves That Require A Punch Button & Has Difficulty Blocking
P1 Cannot Do Special Moves That Require A Kick Button & Has Difficulty Blocking
P1 Is A New Color (Other Than Previously Available)
P1 Tends To Warp Around A Lot
P1 Is Very Fast And Warps Around A Lot
P1 Becomes Unable To Move After Hit And Continues That Way Until Knocked Down
P1 Gets About 1.5 Seconds of Hang Time When Jumping
When P1 Gets Hit By A Strong Attack, He is Knocked to the End Of The Screen; Cannot be Knocked Down
P1 Most Projectiles Are Very Slow & Sometimes Two Are Released
P1 Most Projectiles Are Medium Speed & Sometimes Two Are Released
P1 Most Projectiles Are Fast Speed & Sometimes Two Are Released
P1 Projectiles Are Mega-Fast With Instant Recovery
P1 Becomes Frozen When Performing A Projectile And Cannot be Unfrozen Until Hit
P1 Mid-Air Projectiles Make You Stay in Mid-Air And You Can Walk Around. When You Jump, You Go Back To The Ground
When P1 Gets Hit, They Turn Into An Animal
P2 Can't Charge Up Special Meter
P2 Only Needs to Win 1 Round
P2 Cannot Do Special Moves That Require A Punch Button & Has Difficulty Blocking
P2 Cannot Do Special Moves That Require A Kick Button & Has Difficulty Blocking
P2 Is A New Color (Other Than Previously Available)
P2 Tends To Warp Around A Lot
P2 Is Very Fast And Warps Around A Lot
P2 Becomes Unable to Move After Hit And Continues That Way Until Knocked Down
P2 Gets About 1.5 Seconds of Hang Time When Jumping
When P2 Gets Hit By a Strong Attack, He Is Knocked to the End of the Screen & Cannot Be Knocked Down
P2 Most Projectiles Are Very Slow & Sometimes Two Are Released
P2 Most Projectiles Are Medium Speed & Sometimes Two Are Released
P2 Most Projectiles Are Fast Speed & Sometimes Two Are Released
P2 Projectiles Are Mega-Fast With Instant Recovery
P2 Becomes Frozen When Performing A Projectile And Cannot be Unfrozen Until Hit
P2 Mid-Air Projectiles Make You Stay In Midair And You Can Walk Around. When You Jump, You Go Back to The Ground
When P2 Gets Hit, They Turn Into An Animal
Most Attacks Pass Through Both Players
Players Can Only Be Hurt By Projectiles And Throws
